title: MT Enhanced Sprint O' Meter
description: enhanced visual style of the Sprint O' Meter mod
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/229e308a9ab1d63da8b21f35e50ff6ee1aa7b1c3.png)

Introducing the Resource Pack for [Sprint O' Meter ](https://modrinth.com/mod/sprintometer):

- Modern twist on classic mod interface.
- Sleek and minimalist design.
- Focuses on seamless, visually stunning experience.
- Clean lines and refined aesthetic.
- Removes clutter for intuitive design.

Experience the future of mods with our cutting-edge Resource Pack.

![screeen1.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6338e1423a0083ca02cebbed599a8b45aa232706.png)
![screeen2.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae1ad62b6ddf9420c176c165e2a8115cda91b608.png)
